CheckTitle: 检查RDS Cluster critical events are subscribed.
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks, AWS Security Best Practices
Description: 确保Amazon RDS event notification subscriptions已启用 for 数据库 cluster events, particularly maintenance and failure.
Risk: 如果没有事件订阅s for critical events, such as maintenance and failures, you may not be aware of issues affecting your RDS 集群s, leading to downtime or 安全漏洞.

Recommendation.Text: To subscribe to RDS 集群 event notifications, see Subscribing to Amazon RDS event notification in the Amazon RDS User Guide.
